subject: docs(accuracy): fix 7 documentation discrepancies found by docs audit
body:
- Add missing ProjectImage component to CLAUDE.md project structure
- Update vite-plugin-pwa version from ^0.21.1 to ^1.2.0 in suggested implementations
- Fix stale prebuild reference in AI Notes (sharp is manual, not a build step)
- Clarify light/dark toggle TODO as aspirational vs Key Decisions
- Update EXTERNAL_REFERENCES.md last-verified date
- Correct test counts from 108 to 135 in SESSION_NOTES.md and HISTORY.md
